mobileGateBody: The OpenCut editor needs a larger screen. Please use a desktop device.
onboardingTitle1: ⚠️ This is a super early beta!
onboardingDesc0: You're among the first to try OpenCut - the fully open source CapCut alternative.
onboardingDesc1a: There's still a ton of things to do to make this editor amazing.
onboardingDesc1b: A lot of features are still missing. We're working hard to build them out!
onboardingDesc1c: If you're curious, check out our roadmap [here](https://opencut.app/roadmap)
onboardingDesc2: Join our [Discord]({{discordUrl}}), chat with cool people and share feedback to help make OpenCut the best editor ever.
scenesDescription: Switch between scenes in your project
deleteScenesConfirm_one: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} scene? This action cannot be undone.
deleteScenesConfirm_other: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} scenes? This action cannot be undone.
projectNotFound: Project not found. Please try reloading.
embeddedRetryHint: Ensure the backend API is running (launch-desktop or uvicorn) and refresh the page.
mobileGateBodyDetailed: OpenCut isn't optimized for mobile or iPad yet. Things will break and the layout will be a mess. Come back on a desktop for the real experience.
deleteProjectWarningSingle: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and all associated files.
deleteProjectWarningMultiple: This will permanently delete {{count}} projects and all associated files.
storageDontLoseBody1: Your browser can automatically delete your projects when storage runs low.
classicRetryHint: Please retry; if the problem persists refresh the page and confirm your browser supports WebAssembly.
migrationUpgradingMultiple: Upgrading projects from v{{from}} to v{{to}}
